resources.string: By distribution of chips, the paper analyzed main stock clinch a deal by chip map is straightforward, in the form of expression comes out, at the same time, through intelligent chip, can accurate judgment the banker cost, the banker with the market average costs, market profit cost comparison, keep up with the pace of the banker, to achieve the final profit.

Through unremitting efforts, Homily’s investment philosophy,“Index,first; Stock, Next. Long-term, First; Short-term, Next. Operate the Familiar.”, has rooted deeply in investors’ mind and helps them gain a lot when invest.

Follow the instructions sent to %1$s to recover your password.
Confirm email to continue sign in

"You originally intended to connect %1$s to your email account but have opened the link on a different device where you are not signed in.
If you still want to connect your %1$s account, open the link on the same device where you started sign-in. Otherwise, tap Continue to sign-in on this device."
The session associated with this sign-in request has either expired or was cleared.
A sign-in email with additional instructions was sent to %1$s. Check your email to complete sign-in.
The action code is invalid. This can happen if the code is malformed, expired, or has already been used.
"If the steps above didn't work, you can resend the email. Note that this will deactivate the link in the older email."

"Try these common fixes: • Check if the email was marked as spam or filtered. • Check your internet connection. • Check that you did not misspell your email. • Check that your inbox space is not running out or other inbox setting related issues. "
Try opening the link using the same device or browser where you started the sign-in process.
Enter the 6-digit code we sent to
"That email address doesn't match an existing account"
There was a problem verifying your phone number
This code is no longer valid
This phone number has been used too many times
Enter your email address to continue
Please enter a first and last name.
Network error, check your internet connection.
Get instructions sent to this email that explain how to reset your password.
By tapping “%1$s”, an SMS may be sent. Message & data rates may apply.
By tapping “%1$s”, you are indicating that you accept our %2$s and %3$s. An SMS may be sent. Message & data rates may apply.
By continuing, you are indicating that you accept our %1$s and %2$s.

"You've already used %1$s. You can connect your %2$s account with %1$s by signing in with email link below.
For this flow to successfully connect your %2$s account with this email, you have to open the link on the same device or browser."
"You've already used %1$s. Sign in with %2$s to continue."
"You've already used %1$s to sign in. Enter your password for that account."

resources.string: If you like Homily Chart and expect it better, please grade it and express your comments in AppStore. Your encouragement will be our power in process

"Homily Software reminds the users to be aware of all the potential risks of stock investment in handhelds in a spirit of being responsible for them. The disclaimer conditions which are suitable for the users who download, receive or get Homily Software program directly or indirectly and use it to make investment analysis are as follows: i. Some information data, viewpoints, investment advice and analysis that are offered in Handheld Homily Software are provided by the third party and are for your reference only. ii. Our company is not responsible for the losses caused by any error, repeat or delay of information and data. iii. The free version of Handheld Homily Software employs 20-minute delayed quotation data; our company is not responsible for your investment decision based on the functions and information in Handheld Homily Software. Without the written consent of our company, it not allowed to offer any other relevant third party any information in Handheld Homily Software with the purpose of earning money or gratuitously."
No data found, Click to retry.
"Running on port %1$d. Tap to open in the device's browser. Or run adb forward tcp:%1$d tcp:%1$d to forward the port to your host."
